setup: No account or API key. Add ?wallet=0xYourAddr to any call for 3 free results per wallet.
Beyond 3, pay per call in USDC on Base via x402 (x402-fetch / x402-axios + a funded Base wallet).

install.command: Use xsignal get_intent - an x402-paid Base-token momentum verdict (gaining/fading) that ABSTAINS when it isn't confident, instead of always guessing. MCP: https://xsignal-production.up.railway.app/mcp
